heading: Authority to require reports by regulated entities
label: 4514 Authority to require reports by regulated entities

children.heading: Regular reports
children.label: 1 Regular reports
children.text: The Director may require, by general or specific orders, a regulated entity to submit regular reports, including financial statements determined on a fair value basis, on the condition (including financial condition), management, activities, or operations of the regulated entity, as the Director considers appropriate (in addition to the annual and quarterly reports required under and ).section 1723a(k) of this titlesection 1456(c) of this title

children.heading: Special reports
children.label: 2 Special reports
children.text: The Director may also require, by general or specific orders, a regulated entity to submit special reports on any of the topics specified in paragraph (1) or any other relevant topics, if, in the judgment of the Director, such reports are necessary to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 3 Limitation
children.text: The Director may not require the inclusion, in any report pursuant to paragraph (1) or (2), of any information that is not reasonably obtainable by the regulated entity.

children.heading: Notice and declaration
children.label: 4 Notice and declaration
children.text: The Director shall notify the regulated entity, a reasonable period in advance of the date for submission of any report under this subsection, of any specific information to be contained in the report and the date for the submission of the report. Each report under this subsection shall contain a declaration by the president, vice president, treasurer, or any other officer designated by the board of directors of the regulated entity to make such declaration, that the report is true and correct to the best of such officer’s knowledge and belief.

children.heading: Capital distributions
children.label: b Capital distributions
children.text: The Director may require a regulated entity to submit a report to the Director after the declaration of any capital distribution by the regulated entity and before making the capital distribution. The report shall be made in such form and under such circumstances and shall contain such information as the Director shall require.

children.heading: Penalties for failure to make reports
children.label: c Penalties for failure to make reports
A
children.text: to fail to make, transmit, or publish any report or obtain any information required by the Director under this section, , , or , within the period of time specified in such provision of law or otherwise by the Director; orsection 1723a(k) of this titlesection 1456(c) of this titlesection 1440 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: to submit or publish any false or misleading report or information under this section.

children.label: I
children.text: the subject regulated entity maintains procedures reasonably adapted to avoid any inadvertent error and the violation was unintentional and a result of such an error; or

children.label: II
children.text: the violation was an inadvertent transmittal or publication of any report which was minimally late.

children.heading: Burden of proof
children.label: ii Burden of proof
children.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, the regulated entity shall have the burden of proving that the error was inadvertent or that a report was inadvertently transmitted or published late.

children.heading: Second tier
children.label: B Second tier
children.text: A violation described in paragraph (1) shall be subject to a penalty of not more than $20,000 for each day during which such violation continues or such false or misleading information is not corrected, in any case that is not addressed in subparagraph (A) or (C).

children.heading: Third tier
children.label: C Third tier
children.text: A violation described in paragraph (1) shall be subject to a penalty of not more than $1,000,000 per day for each day during which such violation continues or such false or misleading information is not corrected, in any case in which the subject regulated entity committed such violation knowingly or with reckless disregard for the accuracy of any such information or report.

children.heading: Assessments
children.label: 3 Assessments
children.text: Any penalty imposed under this subsection shall be in lieu of a penalty under , but shall be assessed and collected by the Director in the manner provided in for penalties imposed under that section, and any such assessment (including the determination of the amount of the penalty) shall be otherwise subject to the provisions of .section 4636 of this titlesection 4636 of this titlesection 4636 of this title

children.heading: Hearing
children.label: 4 Hearing
children.text: A regulated entity against which a penalty is assessed under this section shall be afforded an agency hearing if the regulated entity submits a request for a hearing not later than 20 days after the date of the issuance of the notice of assessment. shall apply to any such proceedings.Section 4634 of this title
